# DashboardWidget

> Individual widget within a dashboard

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| dashboardId | string | yes | - | Parent dashboard ID |
| widgetType | line-chart \| bar-chart \| pie-chart \| metric-card \| table \| heatmap \| waterfall \| timeline | yes | - | Type of visualization widget |
| title | string | yes | - | Widget display title |
| query | json | yes | - | Data query config (entity, aggregation, groupBy, timeRange) |
| position | json | yes | - | Grid position {x, y, w, h} |
| config | json | yes | - | Widget-specific config (colors, thresholds, labels) |
| refreshOverride | integer | yes | - | Override dashboard refresh interval for this widget |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/dashboard-widget` — List all
- `POST /api/dashboard-widget` — Create
- `GET /api/dashboard-widget/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/dashboard-widget/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/dashboard-widget/:id` — Delete
